COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-05-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Short Cause Trial Prove Up Hearing as to Defendant Gary Whitehill of Whitehill Partners, LLC.

Dept. 505; Judge: Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:23 p.m. and concluded at 2:43 p.m. (D505)

Lawrence G. Campitiello, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Kaizen Technology Partner, LLC.
Defendant Gary Whitehill of Whitehill Partners, LLC not appearing.
Witness for Plaintiff, Dao Jensen, Chief Executive Officer of Kaizen Technology Partners, LLC, appeared, placed under oath and testified.

Plaintiff Kaizen Technology Partners, LLC's 2nd amended complaint for Breach of contract was filed on March 17, 2023.
Proof of substituted service by mail as to Defendant Gary Whitehill and Whitehill Partners, LLC served on March 22, 2022, effectuated on April 1, 2022.
Defendant Gary Whitehill and Whitehill Partners, LLC answer to 2nd amended complaint filed April 29, 2022.
Notice of place and time of trial mailed June 20, 2022.
Order granting Defendant Gary Whitehill and Whitehill Partners, LLC's ex-parte application to continue trial filed February 7, 2023.
Plaintiff Kaizen Technology Partners LLC's Motion on Judgment on Pleadings filed July 14, 2023

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Consulting Agreement
Exhibit 2: ACH Payment Information dated 1-08-2021 to Defendant Whitehill Partners, LLC
Exhibit 3: ACH Payment Information dated 1-11-2021 to Defendant Whitehill Partners, LLC
Exhibit 4: ACH Payment Information dated 1-12-2021 to Defendant Whitehill Partners, LLC
Exhibit 5: ACH Payment Information dated 3-01-2021 to Defendant Whitehill Partners, LLC
Exhibit 6: Defendant Whitehill Partners, LLC work product.
Exhibit 7: Email Correspondence dated 3-06-2021.
Exhibit 8: Email Correspondence dated 3-16-2021.
Exhibit 9: Requests for Admission by Plaintiff Kaizen Technology Partners, LLC
Exhibit 10: Order Granting Plaintiff Kaizen Technology Partners, LLC requests for admission.

The Court takes judicial notice of exhibits 9 and 10.

Witness for Plaintiff, Dao Jensen, Chief Executive Officer of Kaizen Technology Partners, LLC is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and Cross-Defendant Kaizen Technology Partners, LLC and against Defendants and Cross- Complainants Gary Whitehill and Whitehill Partners, LLC are as follows:

Damages: $160,000.00

Counsel for Plaintiff and Cross Defendant Kaizen Technology Partners, LLC to submit a Memorandum of Costs and Proposed Judgment.

Parties stipulates to the return of the exhibits.
